_help: Copy this file to ~/.agentic-os/config.json (or to agentic-os.config.json in the project root) and edit the paths to match your machine. Anything you leave out auto-detects or falls back to sensible defaults.
_paths_note: Leave as null to auto-detect via `which`. Or paste the full path you get from `which claude` etc.
_nlm_note: Path to the NotebookLM 'notebooklm-mcp' binary (powers the Notebook tab). Leave null to auto-detect. Install with: uv tool install notebooklm-mcp-cli  — then run: nlm login. See install/15-NOTEBOOKLM.md.
_vault_note: Full path to your Obsidian vault. Leave null and we'll try ~/Documents/Obsidian Vault, ~/Obsidian, ~/Obsidian Vault.
_username_note: Your display name, shown in the Agent Room etc. Defaults to "You" so a fresh install is never personalised to someone else. Set it to your first name if you like. (Also settable via AGENTIC_OS_USER_NAME.)
_voice_note: To change the Hermes/Jarvis voice: connect your ElevenLabs key, then set AGENTIC_OS_TTS_VOICE=<your voice id> (env or ~/.hermes/profiles/main/.env), or pick a voice in Video → Director. See install/3-JARVIS-VOICE.md.
_agent_note: Which openclaw agent to chat with by default (main, personal, marketing, etc.). Run `openclaw agents list` to see yours.
_roomAgents_note: ADVANCED — repoint any AI Agent Mastermind (/room) agent without editing code. Keyed by agent id: claude, hermes, gemini, codex, openclaw, glm, fcc. provider can be 'openrouter' (default), 'ollama' (local), or 'openai' (any OpenAI-compatible endpoint via baseUrl + apiKeyEnv — e.g. your z.ai GLM key, Sakana, LM Studio). Leave the whole thing out to use the defaults.
_location_note: Shown in the top-bar timestamp. e.g. "Bangkok", "London", or just "Local".
